LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WALTER L. WILLIAMS' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL IS NOW CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 1, 2012 WHICH THE PARTIES MUTUALLY AGREE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT WILLIAMS'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM FEB-16-2012 TO MAR-20-2012, PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST THROUGH 7TH, 10TH AND 11TH CAUSES OF ACTION, AND SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 12TH AND 13TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE 1ST THROUGH 7TH, 10TH AND 11TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED AND NOT UNCERTAIN, INCLUDING SUFFICIENT ALLEGATIONS OF STANDING AND THE TOLLING OF STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND THE 12TH AND 13TH CAUSES OF ACTION AND TO ADD CLAIMS FOR CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST AND RESCISSION OF THE DEED ARE GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-01-2012 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON DEC-10-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. PLAINTIFF WALTER WILLIAMS APPEARED IN COURT. PAULA CANNY APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ROBERT WILLIAMS. MR. WILLIAMS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HIS COUNSEL, ROBERT CHEASTY, WILL BE LATE. MATTER WAS RECALLED AND PAULA CANNY REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE SPOKE WITH MR. CHEASTY THAT HE WILL NOT BE ABLE TO MAKE IT IN COURT DUE TO ILLNESS AND REQUESTED FOR A 60 DAY CONTINUANCE TO FINALIZE THE SETTLEMENT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 12/10/12 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 AND ALL PARTIES WAIVED FURTHER NOTICE. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Continued To Dec-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert C. Cheasty, Esq., of Cheasty & Cheasty, Tel. 510.525.1000, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the 1st through 7th, 10th and 11th causes of action, and sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the 12th and 13th causes of action. The 1st through 7th, 10th and 11th causes of action are adequately pled and not uncertain, including sufficient allegations of standing and the tolling of statute of limitations. Plaintiff's request for leave to amend the 12th and 13th causes of action and to add claims for constructive trust and rescission of the deed are granted. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Walter L. Williams' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS
Granted. The trial is now continued to October 1, 2012 which the parties mutually agree. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 (302/HEK)
